meta.title: Sofwave™ Skin Tightening · i-Beaute Skin + Body, Chatswood
meta.description: Non-invasive ultrasound lifting that visibly tightens skin in a single session — with zero downtime. Sofwave™ at i-Beaute Skin + Body, Chatswood.

hero.sub: Non-invasive ultrasound that visibly tightens the jawline, brows and neck — in a single session, with zero downtime.

pain.title_html:
The mirror started changing
before you were ready.

cards.title: A softening jaw
cards.body: The clean line you took for granted is blurring. Makeup sits differently. Photos catch it from the side.

cards.title: Creams stopped working
cards.body: A drawer full of serums that plump and brighten — but can't touch laxity once the deeper structure starts to give.

cards.title: But surgery feels too far
cards.body: You're not ready for a scalpel, anaesthetic, or two weeks hidden away healing. You just want to look like you — rested.

problem.title_html:
By 35, collagen quietly leaves —
and topicals can't follow it down.
problem.lede: Firmness lives in the deep dermis and the foundation layer beneath it. That's far below where any cream can reach — which is exactly why the right results need to start there.

points.title: Collagen falls ~1% a year
points.body: From your mid-twenties, the scaffold that holds skin taut thins a little every year — and the slide accelerates around menopause.

points.title: The slack is structural
points.body: Laxity isn't a surface problem. It sits in the dermis and SMAS layer — the same tissue a surgeon lifts.

points.title: So the fix must go deep
points.body: To firm skin you have to remodel it at the source: precise energy that triggers your own collagen to rebuild.

story.eyebrow: What the next 12 weeks look like
story.title_html:
A lift that arrives
the way your skin does —
gradually, then obviously.

timeline.title: One ~30-minute session
timeline.body: You relax through a single visit. Walk out, drive home, back to your day. No bandages, no marks to hide.

timeline.title: The first firmness
timeline.body: Skin starts to feel tauter and look smoother as the deep repair response switches on.

timeline.title: The real result
timeline.body: Fresh collagen matures. The jawline reads cleaner, the brow sits a touch higher — natural, never "done."

solution.mark_html: Sofwave™ uses ultrasound to rebuild collagen exactly where firmness is lost — so your skin lifts itself.

how.lede: Sofwave delivers precisely controlled ultrasound energy to the mid-dermis, gently heating the exact depth where collagen is built — while a cooling system keeps the surface comfortable and unmarked.

steps.title: Consult & map
steps.body: We assess your skin and map the zones — jaw, brow, neck, submental — where a lift will read most naturally.

steps.title: The ultrasound pass
steps.body: The Sofwave handpiece glides across each zone, sending energy to the precise depth that triggers new collagen.

steps.title: Walk out & rebuild
steps.body: That's it. Over the following weeks your own body remodels the tissue — and keeps improving for ~3 months.

proof.title_html:
The clinic Chatswood
keeps coming back to.
proof.sample_note: Verified client reviews across i-Beaute's treatments (Fresha & Bookwell). Individual results vary; Sofwave suitability is assessed at your consultation.

quotes.quote: Feel so pampered after the treatment. Portia and her staff are very professional and friendly.
quotes.name: Maria W.

quotes.quote: My skin was blocked, clogged and breaking out. The team analysed my needs…
quotes.name: Kelly B.

quotes.quote: Extremely friendly staff. Highly recommend — will be going back. Amazing!
quotes.name: Ayva

authority.title_html:
A skin & body clinic,
not a quick-fix counter.
authority.body: At i‑Beaute Skin + Body in Chatswood, advanced treatments are delivered by trained skin therapists who treat your face as a whole — never a single sale. Every Sofwave plan starts with a proper consultation and an honest answer about whether it's right for you.
creds: The Gallery, Suite 16 · 445 Victoria Ave, Chatswood

items.title: Full skin consultation
items.body: A proper assessment of your skin, your goals and whether Sofwave is the right call.

items.title: Targeted Sofwave treatment
items.body: Jawline, brow, neck or submental — mapped to where a lift reads most naturally on you.

items.title: Comfort-first protocol
items.body: Integrated cooling and an experienced therapist keep the session calm and comfortable.

items.title: Aftercare & review
items.body: Simple guidance and a check-in as your collagen rebuilds over the following weeks.

offer.title: Sofwave™ Consultation
bullets: A clear, honest plan and price for your areas
offer.fine: Treatment pricing is tailored to the areas you're treating and confirmed at your consultation.

comparison.title_html:
The lift between a cream
and a scalpel.

yes.title: Sofwave is for you if…
items: You're noticing early to moderate laxity on the jaw, brow or neck
You want a natural lift, not a dramatic change
You can't fit surgical downtime around work and family
You'd rather invest once than chase results with creams

no.title: Maybe not, if…
items: You have significant, advanced sagging better suited to surgery
You expect an instant, overnight transformation
You're pregnant or have certain medical conditions — we'll advise honestly at consult

items.a: Most clients describe a warming sensation with brief moments of heat as the energy is delivered. Sofwave's integrated cooling keeps the skin surface comfortable, and your therapist adjusts to you throughout.
Correct. You may have mild redness or slight puffiness for a short time, but there are no marks to hide. Most people return to work or their day immediately.
Some firmness appears in the first weeks, but the real result builds as new collagen matures — typically over about three months after a single session.

Results from new collagen are long-lasting, though your skin keeps ageing naturally. Many clients choose a maintenance session down the track. We'll give you an honest, personalised view at your consult.

items.q: Is it safe for my skin tone?
items.a: Yes. Sofwave's ultrasound energy works independently of melanin, so it's suitable for all skin tones, and can be done year-round.
With a complimentary consultation. We assess your skin, answer everything, and only recommend Sofwave if it's genuinely right for you. Book in seconds on Fresha.

final.body: One session. Zero downtime. A lift that looks like nothing but good sleep and good genes. Start with a complimentary consultation.
